name: onc care chicken & vegetable stew dog food
description: when dogs have cancer, ensuring their nutritional needs are met is critical. therapeutic foods for dogs with cancer are designed to help maintain strength and energy as well as encourage eating from the very first bowl. 거부할수 없는 뛰어난 맛으로 식욕 자극 소화가 잘 되는 단백질로 구성돼 체력 및 에너지 유지 지원 activbiome+기술을 통해 반려견의 장내 마이크로바이옴 영양 공급
